text.tspan: The experiment was performed using a simple point-to-point Ethernet topology.
• Server generating continuous HTTP download traffic • Client receiving the data stream
• Passive Network TAP inserted inline • Protocol analyzer capturing traffic via the TAP monitor port
The TAP ensures that packet capture occurs without modifying packet timing or introducing additional forwarding delay.
All measurements focus on the Server → Client direction.
Direct back-to-back; no switch / no router
In-line Production Link: 10/100/1000 Mbps Full-Duplex Ethernet
Transmission Delay(also known as Serialization Delay)
